description_long: This object depicts two humanoid robots posed on a detailed diorama base. One robot, with short white hair and a black dress, sits atop a rocky outcrop adorned with white flowers, while the other, with similar hair and attire, stands with arms crossed and back turned to the first. Both figures have mechanical features, such as segmented joints and metallic textures, and wear dark, futuristic clothing with armored elements. A sword is embedded in the ground near the sitting robot, and a large, weathered mechanical head lies partially buried at the base, surrounded by debris and vegetation. The base is rectangular with a stylized black and white border, simulating a section of urban terrain. The overall scene combines organic and mechanical elements, evoking a post-apocalyptic or cybernetic aesthetic.
description: Two humanoid robots in dark, futuristic attire are posed on a rocky, flower-strewn diorama base with a sword and a large mechanical head, blending organic and mechanical details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sitting robot with crossed legs, the sword, and the mechanical head on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the back-to-back posture of the two robots and the layered terrain of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the standing robot with arms crossed and the detailed base behind both figures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sitting robot's profile, the sword, and the mechanical head from a different angle.
attribute_pose: One robot is sitting with one leg crossed over the other atop a rock, while the other stands with arms crossed and back turned to the first; both heads are slightly tilted downward.
attribute_clothing_style: Both robots wear short, dark, futuristic dresses with armored panels, thigh-high boots, gloves, and decorative trims, resembling a cyberpunk or post-apocalyptic style.
attribute_facial_features: Both robots have stylized, human-like faces with pale skin, small noses, and closed mouths; their eyes are partially obscured by white hair, giving a mysterious, expressionless appearance.
attribute_limb_articulation: Visible segmented joints at the shoulders, elbows, knees, and hips suggest multiple hinge and rotary articulation points; limbs appear flexible and capable of a wide range of motion.
